core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix luxury real estate aesthetics with high-tech AI visuals.
Emotion First: Trust, Clarity, and Future-Forward.
Content is King: Tell a story of effortless property management.
Generous Spacing: Use 120px padding for sections to create a premium feel.
Tactile Depth: Use shadows and hover lifts to make the UI feel physical.
anti_patterns: No standard gradients (use the specified brand gradient).

typography.import_instruction: Add this to index.html or import in CSS: <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=Playfair+Display:wght@400;500;600;700;800;900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

usage_rules.headings: Use Playfair Display for all H1-H3. Font weights 700-900 for impact.
usage_rules.body: Use Inter for all body text, UI labels, and data.
usage_rules.special: Use Gradient Text for key keywords in headings.

layout.grid_system: Use 'Bento Grid' variations. Don't just stack divs. Use col-span-2 for feature highlights.

buttons.style: rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-bold transition-all duration-300

variants.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#667eea] to-[#764ba2] text-white hover:shadow-lg hover:scale-105

cards.style: bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-md hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-2 border border-gray-100

nova_chatbot.style: rounded-full w-16 h-16 bg-gradient-to-r from-[#667eea] to-[#4fd1c5] shadow-2xl flex items-center justify-center text-white cursor-pointer hover:scale-110 transition-transform

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. THEME SETUP: Immediately update 'index.css' to include the specific fonts (Playfair Display) and the color variables defined in this JSON.
2. GRADIENTS: Use the 'brand_main' gradient for the primary CTA buttons and important text highlights (bg-clip-text).
3. CARD HOVER: Implement the 'hover:-translate-y-2' class on all property and feature cards. It's a key requirement.
4. NOVA CHATBOT: Create a global 'NovaChat' component that sits in the layout. It must have the bounce animation.
5. PADDING: Do not scrimp on padding. Use 'py-32' (128px) for major section spacing as requested (approx 120px).
6. SHADCN OVERRIDES: Customize Shadcn components to use 'rounded-xl' or 'rounded-2xl'. Default 'rounded-md' is too sharp for this brand.
7. IMAGES: Use the provided Unsplash/Pexels URLs. Do not leave empty placeholders.
8. MAP: For the Browse page, if a real map isn't working, use the 'map_placeholder' image with a 'Coming Soon' or 'Interactive Map' overlay to maintain design fidelity.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add '.App { text-align: center; }' in the css file.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute.
